goals: Focus entirely on upgrading your internal core capabilities. 1) Machine Learning & NLP: Implement a robust framework for self-evaluation and text classification using lightweight libraries. 2) Self-Healing & Error Handling: Create an automated diagnostic module that catches python runtime errors, reads execution logs, and automatically patches code context to prevent loops or crashes. 3) Self-Evolution: Enable the agent to learn from past execution logs to optimize its prompt weights and system prompts. CRITICAL: All operations must be production-ready, safe, and fully integrated with core.py and filesystem.py.
